intended_use: MR Contour DL is intended to be used as a workflow tool for initial anatomy segmentation of organs at risk on MR images as an aid in radiation therapy planning after user confirmation.
intended_use_full: MR Contour DL is intended to be used as a workflow tool for initial anatomy segmentation of organs at risk on MR images as an aid in radiation therapy planning after user confirmation.
target_condition: Radiation therapy planning for head/neck and pelvis cancers
ground_truth: Manual contours delineated by trained GEHC operators following international guidelines (DAHANCA, RTOG) and revised/approved by three board-certified radiation oncologists
other_metrics: DICE Similarity Coefficient (DSC) mean 81.1% across all organs; HD95 (Hausdorff Distance 95th percentile) mean 4.7 mm; Reader study Likert scores with mean ≥3.0 for all organs (range 3.0-4.5)
